shapeindices 0.3.1
  • Reference
    • 1. Basic Usage
    • 2. Understanding Convexity Index
    • 3. Understanding Moment of Inertia Index
    • 4. Understanding Span Index
    • 5. Understanding Radial Concentration Index
    • 6. Understanding Moment Isotropy Index
    • 7. Understanding Directional Balance Index
    • 8. Understanding Depth Index
    • 9. Understanding the Classical Compactness Metrics
    • 10. Comparing Shape Indices: North Carolina Counties

Package index

All functions

cdt_triangles()
Constrained Delaunay triangulation of a (multi)polygon
convex_decompose()
Convex decomposition of a (multi)polygon (Hertel-Mehlhorn).
convexity_index()
Convexity/dispersal index of a (multi)polygon
convexity_index_sf()
convexity_index() for every row of an sf data frame
depth_index()
Depth index: mean distance to the boundary vs an equal-area circle
depth_index_sf()
depth_index() for every row of an sf data frame
detour_index()
Detour compactness score of a (multi)polygon
detour_index_sf()
detour_index() for every row of an sf data frame
directional_balance_index()
Directional balance index of a (multi)polygon's mass distribution
directional_balance_index_sf()
directional_balance_index() for every row of an sf data frame
exchange_index()
Exchange compactness score of a (multi)polygon
exchange_index_sf()
exchange_index() for every row of an sf data frame
hull_ratio_index()
Convex hull area ratio of a (multi)polygon
hull_ratio_index_sf()
hull_ratio_index() for every row of an sf data frame
moment_isotropy_index()
Moment isotropy index of a (multi)polygon's mass distribution
moment_isotropy_index_sf()
Vectorised wrapper for an sf data frame - each row indexed independently.
moment_of_inertia_index()
Polar moment-of-inertia compactness/dispersal index of a (multi)polygon.
moment_of_inertia_index_sf()
Vectorised wrapper for an sf data frame - each row indexed independently.
polsby_popper_index()
Polsby-Popper compactness score of a (multi)polygon
polsby_popper_index_sf()
polsby_popper_index() for every row of an sf data frame
prepare_polygon()
Validate and triangulate a polygon once
radial_concentration_index()
Radial concentration index: mean distance to the geometric median vs an equal-area circle
radial_concentration_index_sf()
radial_concentration_index() for every row of an sf data frame
reock_index()
Reock compactness score of a (multi)polygon
reock_index_sf()
reock_index() for every row of an sf data frame
shape_indices()
All indices (or a chosen subset) for a single (multi)polygon
shape_indices_sf()
All indices (or a chosen subset) for every feature in an sf data frame.
span_index()
Span index: mean pairwise interior distance vs. an equal-area circle
span_index_sf()
span_index() for every row of an sf data frame
subdivide_mesh()
Adaptive subdivision of a CDT mesh into a finer triangle mesh.
tri_quad_points()
3-point interior (Hammer-Stroud) quadrature rule for a triangle
width_length_ratio_index()
Width-length ratio of a (multi)polygon's minimum-area bounding rectangle
width_length_ratio_index_sf()
width_length_ratio_index() for every row of an sf data frame

Developed by Nikhil Kaza.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
